description_long: This is a modern reception or office counter with a two-tiered design, featuring a raised black countertop and a lower working surface. The front section includes a set of three drawers on the right, each with a visible handle, and a single cabinet door on the left, which is slightly ajar to reveal an empty interior. The main body is constructed from light-colored wood or laminate, while the countertop is a contrasting dark color, likely black or dark gray. The back of the unit is plain, with a recessed open shelf area beneath the upper counter, providing additional storage or legroom. The overall design is functional and streamlined, suitable for use in urban office lobbies, reception areas, or service counters.
description: A modern two-tiered reception counter with a black top, three drawers, and a cabinet door, made from light-colored wood or laminate. Functional and streamlined, ideal for office or service environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with handles, an open cabinet door, and the raised black countertop.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the counter, the drawer stack, and the layered countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back panel with a recessed open shelf beneath the upper counter.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the cabinet door and the profile of the two-tiered countertop.
